title: ocotea gomezii
intro: Ocotea gomezii, also known as Canelo de monte or Canella mexicana, is a plant species native to Mexico, belonging to the Laurel family (Lauraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Ocotea gomezii include its potential to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms associated with digestive issues. Ocotea gomezii is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and its essential oil can also be used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
